benefits.description: Endorses low-dose GH for athletes with dialed-in diet, recovery, training, and sleep

side_effects.description: Swollen fingers, higher BP, water retention at higher doses (4IU+); describes it as 'a pretty dirty drug' above 1-2IU

protocol_notes: Shares personal experience/opinion that higher doses above 1-2IU are not worth it. Believes people 40+ are likely to run into side effects at 4IU. Suggests natural IGF-1 is around 100 for most people.
